# XcodeKit Version Constants

**API Collection**

Determine the version of XcodeKit available in an instance of Xcode.

## XcodeKit Versions

- **XCXcodeKitVersionNumber**: The current version of XcodeKit.
- **XCXcodeKitVersionNumber_Xcode_8_0**: The version of XcodeKit included in Xcode 8.0.

items.description: The version of XcodeKit included in Xcode 8.0.
